ddls:
CREATE TABLE "food_items" (
  "food_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each food item */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the food item */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the food type */,
  "calories" INTEGER /* Calories per serving */,
  "protein" INTEGER /* Protein content per serving */,
  "fat" INTEGER /* Fat content per serving */,
  "sodium" INTEGER /* Sodium content per serving */,
  "fiber" INTEGER /* Fiber content per serving */,
  "carbohydrates" INTEGER /* Carbohydrates content per serving */,
  "sugars" INTEGER /* Sugars content per serving */,
  "potassium" INTEGER /* Potassium content per serving */,
  "vitamins" INTEGER /* Vitamin content per serving */,
  "shelf_life" INTEGER /* Shelf life of the food item */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the food item */,
  "number_of_cuts" INTEGER /* Number of cuts for the food item */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the food item based on user reviews */,
  "allergens" TEXT /* List of common allergens */,
  "dietary_restrictions" TEXT /* Indicators for dietary restrictions */,
  "preparation_methods" TEXT /* Detailed preparation methods for the food item */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the food item */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL to a video demonstrating preparation methods */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date the food item was added to the database */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the food item's information was last updated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the food item data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("food_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_food_items_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES food_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_food_items_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the manufacturer */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the manufacturer's website */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the manufacturer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the manufacturer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the manufacturer is based */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the manufacturer was founded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "food_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each food type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the food type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the food type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Higher-level category for food types */,
  "nutritional_focus" TEXT /* Main nutritional focus of the food type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nutritional_values" (
  "nutrition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nutritional value set */,
  "food_id" INTEGER /* ID of the food item */,
  "calories" INTEGER /* Calories per serving */,
  "protein" INTEGER /* Protein content per serving */,
  "fat" INTEGER /* Fat content per serving */,
  "sodium" INTEGER /* Sodium content per serving */,
  "fiber" INTEGER /* Fiber content per serving */,
  "carbohydrates" INTEGER /* Carbohydrates content per serving */,
  "sugars" INTEGER /* Sugars content per serving */,
  "potassium" INTEGER /* Potassium content per serving */,
  "vitamins" INTEGER /* Vitamin content per serving */,
  "serving_size" INTEGER /* Standard serving size for the nutritional values */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the serving size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nutrition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nutritional_values_food_id FOREIGN KEY ("food_id") REFERENCES food_items ("food_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shelf_lives" (
  "shelf_life_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shelf life entry */,
  "food_id" INTEGER /* ID of the food item */,
  "shelf_life" INTEGER /* Shelf life of the food item */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions required for optimal storage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shelf_life_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shelf_lives_food_id FOREIGN KEY ("food_id") REFERENCES food_items ("food_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "food_weights" (
  "weight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weight entry */,
  "food_id" INTEGER /* ID of the food item */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the food item */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the weight */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_food_weights_food_id FOREIGN KEY ("food_id") REFERENCES food_items ("food_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "food_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating entry */,
  "food_id" INTEGER /* ID of the food item */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the food item */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the rating */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the user's review */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was submitted */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review helpful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_food_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_food_ratings_food_id FOREIGN KEY ("food_id") REFERENCES food_items ("food_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the application */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "dietary_preferences" TEXT /* User's dietary preferences */,
  "nutritional_goals" TEXT /* User's nutritional goals */,
  "favorite_foods" TEXT /* List of user's favorite food items */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "food_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preferred food type */,
  "dietary_restriction" TEXT /* Preferred dietary restriction */,
  "nutritional_focus" TEXT /* Preferred nutritional focus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_food_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("food_type_id") REFERENCES food_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_consumption" (
  "consumption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each consumption entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "food_id" INTEGER /* ID of the consumed food item */,
  "consumption_date" TEXT /* Date the food item was consumed */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the food item consumed */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the quantity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consumption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_consumption_food_id FOREIGN KEY ("food_id") REFERENCES food_items ("food_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_consumption_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
